# CLAUDE.md

## Working with generated files
`dvc.lock`, `results/*.csv`, and other DVC-generated outputs are large and regenerated by the pipeline — don't read them in full. Check `dvc status`/`dvc diff` or read a small slice instead of the whole file.

## Training runs
Don't have training/eval logs pasted into chat — run `dvc repro` and inspect `results/*.csv` directly for what changed.
